application_id.description:
A Twitter-like snowflake, except the epoch is 2015-01-01T00:00:00.000Z
```
If we have a snowflake '266241948824764416' we can represent it as binary:

64                                          22     17     12          0
 000000111011000111100001101001000101000000  00001  00000  000000000000
      number of ms since Discord epoch       worker  pid    increment
```

JsonValue.description:
Represents any possible JSON value:
- number
- string
- boolean
- null
- object (with any JSON value as property)
- array (with any JSON value as element)
